title: Goodyear Folding Windshield Sun Shade 130 * 60cm – Durable UV & Heat Blocker with Secure Suction Cups | Protects Interior from Sun & Dust | Compact & Easy to Store
features: Goodyear Heavy Duty Folding Car Sun Reflector
Folds for quick and easy storage - Helps to keep your car interior ultra cool during the summer as it deflects 100% of the sunlight
- Prevents dashboard from discolouring and lifting from the suns rays - Suitable for both front and rear windscreens (please note only one is included)
Rubber suction cups ensure it's firmly stuck to the windscreen - Folds for quick and easy storage
